sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ يَوْمِيًّا مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Svakodnevno konzumiranje povrća i voća je veoma važno za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits daily is very important for the body.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ تَحْمِينَا مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Ove namirnice sadrže vitamine koji nas štite od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: These foods contain vitamins that protect us from diseases.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّهُ مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ شُرْبُ الْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Također je neophodno piti puno vode tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: It is also necessary to drink a lot of water throughout the day.
